text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If only I could speak with just a little 
more oomph… Well, practice makes 
perfect, so here goes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: She sells seashells… by the seashore.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that went quite nicely. Surely I must 
have beaten the time I recorded yesterday…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, I forgot to time it.
